headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -61.1)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 37% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 137 quotes, including 103 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and irritation today.

• At 69.2, frustration levels sit in the middle-high range for the period but well below the 164.1 peak.

• Both fears and optimism declined further from yesterday's already negative levels, leaving frustrations as the clear emotional driver.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
